## v0.9.0

### Added
- **XML/HTML literal syntax**: `<tag attr={expr}>...</tag>` transpiles to `xml_element()`/`xml_attrs()` calls. Supports static and dynamic attributes, boolean attributes, self-closing elements, namespaced tags (`<ui:Table.Cell>`), `{expr}` interpolation, `{SELECT ...}` subqueries with `xml_agg()` aggregation, `{SELECT/1 ...}` singular subqueries, `{{...}}` JSON object interpolation, JSON path navigation inside XML, and literal brace escaping (`{'{'}`).
- **Interactive CLI** (`sqldeep`): Full SQLite shell (readline, dot-commands, all flags) with sqldeep transpilation and XML runtime functions (`xml_element`, `xml_attrs`, `xml_agg`) built in. Build with `mk shell`.
- XML literals can appear as JSON field values: `{ card: <div>{name}</div> }`
- Design paper: `docs/papers/xml-literals.md`

### Fixed
